criticalIssues.description: 12 vehicles in this batch do not exist: Ford Focus 2019-2025 (discontinued in US after 2018) and Ford Fusion 2002-2005 (didn't exist until 2006)
4 invalid Focus entries (2019, 2021, 2022, 2024) show 5x114.3 bolt pattern - Focus uses 5x108. These appear to be template data incorrectly applied.
4 duplicate entries found for Ford Fusion S (2011 and 2012 each have 2 entries from different sources)

platformNotes.FordFocus3rdGen: 2012-2018 US market. Platform: Ford C1 (global C-car). Bolt pattern: 5x108, Hub bore: 63.4mm. Discontinued in US after 2018 due to sedan phase-out strategy. 4th gen Focus (2019+) was never sold in North America.
platformNotes.FordFusion1stGen: 2006-2012. Platform: Ford CD3 (Mazda G). Bolt pattern: 5x114.3, Hub bore: 67.1mm. First Ford sedan with 3-bar grille.
platformNotes.FordFusion2ndGen: 2013-2020. Platform: Ford CD4. Bolt pattern changed to 5x108, Hub bore: 63.4mm. Shared with Lincoln MKZ and Ford Mondeo (Europe).
